mapper.select:
SELECT el.log_id, el.device_id, el.daily_kwh, el.cost, el.efficiency, el.log_date, d.device_name, g.group_name
FROM energy_log el
JOIN ess_device d ON el.device_id = d.device_id
LEFT JOIN ess_device_group g ON d.group_id = g.group_id
WHERE el.device_id = #{deviceId} AND el.log_date = #{logDate}

SELECT el.log_id, el.device_id, el.daily_kwh, el.cost, el.efficiency, el.log_date, d.device_name, g.group_name
FROM energy_log el
JOIN ess_device d ON el.device_id = d.device_id
LEFT JOIN ess_device_group g ON d.group_id = g.group_id
WHERE el.device_id = #{deviceId}
ORDER BY el.log_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO energy_log ( device_id, daily_kwh, cost, efficiency, log_date ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{dailyKwh}, #{cost}, #{efficiency}, #{logDate} )

INSERT INTO energy_log ( device_id, daily_kwh, cost, efficiency, log_date ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{dailyKwh}, #{cost}, #{efficiency}, #{logDate} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE daily_kwh = VALUES(daily_kwh), cost = VALUES(cost), efficiency = VALUES(efficiency)
mapper.select:
SELECT #{deviceId} AS deviceId,
IFNULL(SUM(m.solar_generation_kwh), 0) AS dailyKwh,
IFNULL(SUM(m.saved_cost), 0) AS cost,
CASE WHEN IFNULL(SUM(m.used_energy_kwh), 0) = 0 THEN 80 ELSE LEAST( 100, ROUND( ( IFNULL(SUM(m.solar_generation_kwh), 0) / IFNULL(SUM(m.used_energy_kwh), 1) ) * 100, 2 ) ) END AS efficiency,
#{logDate} AS logDate
FROM monitoring m
WHERE m.device_id = #{deviceId} AND DATE(m.record_time) = #{logDate}

SELECT device_id FROM ess_device WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND IFNULL(deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
ORDER BY device_id ASC
